demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult son is with him and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't even get water down anymore; it just burns terribly and then I cough it all back up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last day or two I've gone from struggling with food to not being able to swallow water at all, and every time I try I choke and cough it up. I feel wrung out and can't keep anything in.

symptom_narrative.onset: the swallowing trouble has been creeping up for about four months, but in the last 48 hours I can't get liquids down at all
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly four months, sharply worse in the last two days
symptom_narrative.character: food sticks and then it burns going down; now even water won't pass and comes straight back up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's frightening now — I can't drink anything and I feel completely drained and weak
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right behind my breastbone, in the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse and worse over months, and every single swallow now sets off coughing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; the antacids I buy do nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to eat or drink anything, especially liquids, brings on the coughing and choking
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've lost a lot of weight without trying, my clothes hang off me, my voice has gone hoarse, and I keep bringing up foul-smelling food I ate earlier
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bad heartburn and reflux for years, but never anything like not being able to swallow
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm mostly stuck in bed, exhausted, and I can't feed myself or keep fluids in

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing severe heartburn and acid reflux
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter antacids, which no longer help

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older man living at home; adult son present and helping

objective_data_offered.value: looks very thin, frail and unwell; his face looks hollow and his clothes hang loosely
his voice sounds hoarse and croaky over the video call
son reports he coughs, splutters and chokes every time he tries to sip water
son reports he brings up foul-smelling, undigested food a little while after trying to eat
nutrition supplement drinks on the bedside table are untouched
